titleStmt.title: SII 11.203: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 203. (B.K. No. 90 of 1926-27.) MUḶGUND, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON THE DHVAJASTAṀBHA IN FRONT OF THE NĀRĀYAṆADĒVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription is not dated. It registers a gift of three ḍōṇis at the village Posayūr belonging to god Nārāyaṇadēva, made by Narasiṅgha-Bhaṭṭa, the disciple of Sakalaprakāśa-Bhaṭṭāraka, who was worshipped (ārādhya) by the king Tribhuvanamalladēva. Sakalaprakāśa-Bhaṭṭāraka figures as ruling over the Perggēri of Muḷugunda and Posavūr in B.K. No. 114 of 1926-27 (No. 152, above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmattribhuvanamalladēva rārādhya rappa śrī
matsakalaprakāśabhaṭṭārakadēva rāḷke [yiṁ da-]
vara cāta narasiṅghabhaṭṭa nīstāna maṁ prati
pāḷisuttire nārāyaṇadēvarggāḷva posayū
ralli sarvvanamasyamāge dēvaraṁga bhōgakke biṭṭa
ḍōṇi mūṟu Intī dharmmava nā rūrvvaru
pratipāḷsidargge vāraṇāsi kuru kṣētrado
ḷu caturvvēdapāragarappa sahasra brā
hmaṇargge sahasrakavileya koṭṭa pu
Intīdharmmama naḷidaṁge sahasra brā
hmaṇaraṁ sahasrakavileya naḷida pātaka
© sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu rnripāṇāṁ
kālēkālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānē
tāṁ bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrāṁ bhū yō bhūyō
Ācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattāṁ para dattāṁ
vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭi
vvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kri
mi .
Digital edition of SII 11.203 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
